raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 397 will provide relief to communities facing hardships related to poverty.",
    "The California Child Tax Credit will provide up to $1,154 in tax benefits to families with a qualifying child whose income is under $31,950 per year.",
    "The California Young Child Tax Credit is an effective tool to fight poverty.",
    "The Federal government expanded the Federal Child Tax Credit under the American Rescue Plan to include all families with children between 0-18 years old.",
    "State investments like the Young Child Tax Credit are targeted and effective ways to reduce poverty.",
    "Direct cash assistance like the Young Child Tax Credit has proven to lift families out of poverty.",
    "Under AB 397, families with children younger than 10 years old will qualify for the tax credit by 2025.",
    "By 2028, families with children younger than 18 years old, or 19-23 if they are attending college, will qualify for the tax credit under AB 397."
  ]
}
```
